_comment: Fold multiple NERC registrations that share one HQ into a single map dot. Source rows stay in geocoded-orgs.json; build-orgs.mjs merges roles onto the canonical id and drops the satellites from public/nerc/orgs.json.
_review_progress: PAUSE: Batch 14 reviewed (geocoded-orgs indices 1300–1399). Resume at index 1400 (NCR04037). Run: node scripts/nerc/review-map-combine-batch.mjs 15

combines.label: AEP Columbus HQ
combines.summary: Six separate NERC registrations share AEP's Columbus headquarters and appear here as one map location.

combines.label: Flat Ridge 2 wind
combines.summary: Clearlight Energy (America) and Flat Ridge 2 Wind Energy share the same plant address and EIA interconnection record; one map location.
